purpose: Small targeted Dolphin/static trace kit for original Gotcha Force mechanics import.

symbol_map_setup: If auto-load fails, also try Maps\GG4E.map or use Symbols > Load Symbol Map.

capture_policy.dolphin_use: Targeted only: one event window per save state, no broad instruction logs.
default_memory: If r3, r4, r5, or r31 are valid MEM1 pointers, capture 0x40 bytes at each.
Capture the callstack and one pre-hit/one post-hit value for each watched memory field.

runtime_field_watchpoints.install_after: Capture active_borg_base from r3 at 0x8005d4b0 or from r31 at 0x80055c00.
Capture active_borg_base from r3 at 0x8005d4b0 or from r31 at 0x80055c00.
Capture active_borg_base from r3 at 0x8005d4b0 or from r31 at 0x80055c00.
Capture active_borg_base from r3 at 0x8005d4b0 or from r31 at 0x80055c00.
Capture active_borg_base from r3 at 0x8005d4b0 or from r31 at 0x80055c00.
capture: action table entry near 0x802d35a4 when index is used

runtime_field_watchpoints.install_after: Capture active_borg_base from r3 at player-input-bridge 0x80056900.
Capture active_borg_base from r3 at player-input-bridge 0x80056900 after DAT_803c727c is normalized.
Capture active_borg_base from r3 at 0x8005d4b0 or from r31 at 0x80055c00.
Use lock-on/targeting event to backtrace the writer before installing this watchpoint.
Use one damage event to identify the HP write; do not assume an HP offset from current static evidence.

groups.name: camera
groups.event_window: Arena loaded; enable for one frame, then slight movement/turn and lock-on.

breakpoints.event: First camera manager check after arena unpauses.
One frame of follow/lock camera update.
Final look-at matrix build for active camera.
Camera interest target set.
Camera eye position set.
Camera up vector set.
Camera FOV set or refreshed.
capture: f1 FOV value if ABI uses float arg

groups.name: lock-on/targeting
groups.event_window: Two enemies visible; tap/hold lock-on once and target-cycle once if available.

breakpoints.event: Input sample before lock/target change.
Clamped stick input used by camera/targeting.
capture: 0x20 bytes at r3 before and after step

breakpoints.symbol: unnamed likely game-side PAD read/normalization cluster
breakpoints.event: Input normalization for lock-on/targeting frame.
Resolve player/team object while target selection changes.
First action-state update after target changes.

groups.name: jump/fly
groups.event_window: Grounded borg; press jump, then air-jump or hold boost/fly in separate short runs.

breakpoints.event: Jump/fly action transition begins.
Jump/fly helper called from action transition.
capture: candidate position and velocity pointer if register points into MEM1

breakpoints.symbol: zz_006a104_ / helper called from wake/action cluster
breakpoints.event: Velocity/grounded/fly-state helper during jump or boost.
capture: candidate position/velocity fields touched by caller

groups.name: shoot
groups.event_window: Enemy locked at mid range; tap one ranged shot per run.

breakpoints.symbol: unnamed likely game-side PAD read/normalization cluster
breakpoints.event: Shot button sampled.
Shot action transition.

breakpoints.symbol: action/handler table lead near base+0x6fe use
breakpoints.event: Action index dispatch during shot.
Shot helper or projectile spawn path.
capture: projectile/shot pointer if returned or stored

groups.name: melee
groups.event_window: Enemy locked at close range; press close-range attack once.

breakpoints.event: Melee action transition.

breakpoints.symbol: action/handler table lead near base+0x6fe use
breakpoints.event: Action index dispatch during melee.
Melee hit/contact helper path.

groups.name: damage
groups.event_window: Take one hit, then one knockdown/wake-up event; keep each as a separate short run.

breakpoints.event: Knockdown/wake state sets 60-frame invulnerability.
Secondary wake/invulnerability setter.
Invulnerability timer decrements during post-hit/wake state.
Timer init reads 60.0.
Damage-side timer/status update.

groups.name: death
groups.event_window: Low-HP borg; kill exactly one borg and pause at defeat state start.

breakpoints.event: Defeated borg enters death/swap path.
Player swap/death controller timer clears.
capture: 0x80 bytes at r3 before and after step

breakpoints.event: Death path queries team/player state.

groups.name: next-borg spawn
groups.event_window: Force has at least two borgs; let defeated active borg disappear and next borg spawn.

breakpoints.event: Resolve player object before/after next active borg spawns.
Spawn/swap timer reset for incoming borg.
capture: 0x80 bytes at r3 before and after step
active index before and after if identifiable

breakpoints.event: Bridge from defeated borg to next active borg.
capture: new active borg pointer if assigned

breakpoints.event: Team/player state lookup during spawn.

groups.name: action-proof
groups.event_window: Run one short visible-Dolphin capture per action: close-range B, ranged B, X, and Z. The proof requires PAD hits and action/transition hits in the same labeled trace; audio and param-tier groups can be enabled alongside this group.

breakpoints.event: Input sample for B/X/Z action proof.

breakpoints.symbol: unnamed likely game-side PAD read/normalization cluster
breakpoints.event: Game-side normalized PAD state for B/X/Z correlation.
Post-PADRead point where DAT_803c72fc can be sampled or injected before game-side normalization consumes it.
Normalized PAD globals have been written: current at DAT_803c727c, press edge at DAT_803c7284, release edge at DAT_803c7288.

breakpoints.symbol: DAT_803c727c slot0 normalized current input word
breakpoints.event: Reader of slot-0 normalized input current word after zz_010d450_ copies PADStatus.
Reader of slot-0 normalized input press-edge word.
Primary action-state dispatch. r3 is actor; object+0x6fe selects PTR_FUN_802d35a4[index].

breakpoints.symbol: FUN_80056900 / DAT_803c727c to actor command fields
breakpoints.event: Copies normalized controller word into actor+0x5b4 and derives actor+0x5bc press-edge word.
Action-state transition. r3 is actor, r4/new byte is the new +0x6fe state.

breakpoints.symbol: FUN_8005d494 / likely active attack handler, re-arms actor+0x720
breakpoints.event: Likely attack-active handler. Needs PAD correlation before labeling as B melee/special.
Projectile/action helper path after a B/X transition.
Per-frame target/effect dispatch; known caller path for param-tier delta.
capture: DAT_8043612c slot inputs if in registers
breakpoints.confidence: confirmed function, side-effect labels still traced live

groups.name: power-up/param-tier
groups.event_window: Press Z with a visible ally and separately trigger any power-up pickup. This proves whether Z calls the recovered actor+0x74a/+0x74e/+0x750 param-tier system.

breakpoints.event: Initializes actor+0x74a/+0x74e/+0x750 and refreshes param table.
Applies signed delta clamped to [-0x7f,0x7f].
Battle-side tier delta; known decomp note says caller passes DAT_8043612c[slot].
Writes table-backed actor params into actor+0xb8/+0x1dd0/+0x5f8.

groups.name: audio-proof
groups.event_window: Enable with an action-proof run. Exact cue IDs require audio hits in the same labeled B/X/Z trace plus argument/handle inspection; counts alone are not enough.

breakpoints.event: Named SFX query entry point; capture argument register as candidate cue/handle.
Movie/audio stop boundary; useful negative control for non-combat audio.
Audio object callback dispatches by param+0x18 through PTR_FUN_80385638.
Audio object initialization/update lead in the 0x801c58xx cluster.
Second callback installed by zz_01c5824_; inspect args/owner.
Sequence audio continuation entry point.
capture: param_9 sequence object if in register/stack

groups.name: MAIN_MENU_E2E
groups.event_window: Load D:\GotYaForce\main menu gotchaforce.sav, then manually navigate main menu -> mode select -> Adventure/Story -> load path. Keep this trace focused on file/save/load and battle-entry anchors; PAD breakpoints are intentionally excluded because they fill traces before the load path.

breakpoints.event: Disc file open during title/menu, mode select, Adventure/Story load, briefing, or stage transition.
capture: watch for titles.tpl, as_icon.tpl, vsel00_mdl.arc, vsel01_mdl.arc, firstld.pzz, brif00_mdl.arc, entry00_mdl.arc, msg*.mdt, st##_mdl.arc, st##.pzz, set####.arc, hit###.bin, comhit.bin

breakpoints.event: Async disc read after a menu/select/load file opens.
Filesystem table/name load boundary before menu assets are resolved.
HSD archive parse after menu/select/briefing/stage ARC data is read.
Public symbol lookup from parsed menu/select/briefing/stage archives.
Save/load boundary while entering Adventure/Story load flow.
Memory-card check during Adventure/Story load path.
Adventure/Story load reached player/team setup.
Battle camera matrix build proves the load path reached an arena.

groups.name: CPU AI
groups.event_window: Player idle with one visible CPU enemy; let CPU approach and attack for a short window.

breakpoints.event: Identify CPU player object and controlled borg.
AI/controller code queries player/team state.
CPU-selected movement/attack enters shared action state.
CPU action helper after decision.

cannot_implement_without_runtime_capture: Lock-on target pointer location and target selection rules.
Projectile spawn table, projectile owner/target fields, homing parameters, and shot cooldowns.
Melee hitbox/contact representation and close-range attack gating.
HP field offset, damage formula, defense scaling, hitstun, and knockdown thresholds.
Death-to-next-borg timing, force active index location, and GF-energy decrement source.
Jump/fly velocity fields, grounded/airborne flags, boost drain, and per-borg air-jump counts.
B/X action mapping to object+0x6fe/+0x591 state transitions.
Z ally-lock link, if any, to actor+0x74a/+0x74e/+0x750 param-tier power-up fields.
Per-action audio cue IDs and their caller path.
CPU AI decision state, target choice, approach/retreat thresholds, and attack selection.
